Higashi Nippon International University Inter-University Exchange Project
College in the High School department set up in FY26  College in the High School will be an ongoing program with revenue received from SBCTC to supplement the costs of the program beginning in FY27.

establish Spanish-language GED preparation courses as a permanent offering within Columbia Basin College¿s Transitional Studies division. Building on the legacy of the High School Equivalency Program (HEP) and its commitment to migrant and seasonal farmworkers, this program would ensure continued access to Spanish GED preparation for all Spanish-speaking adult learners.
Beyond providing a pathway to GED completion, this initiative creates structured next steps for students to transition into English Language Acquisition (ELA), College, Military service, or I-BEST workforce pathways such as Nursing Assistant Certified (NAC), Phlebotomy, Automotive Technology, Medical Office Secretary, and Early Childhood Education.
